productDisplayName: Baggit Women Yuvraj Jhuti Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cmCrafted from jute with a two-fold open styleOne main compartment with eight card holders, two insert pockets and a zippered pocketPrinted branding on the frontCareWipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
